name: Banoffee Pie
desc: The dessert that started it all. Toffee, banana, and clouds of whipped cream in a buttery biscuit shell.

name: Chocolate Hazelnut Tart
desc: Dark chocolate ganache and roasted hazelnuts in a crisp pastry shell. Elegant. Intense. Unforgettable.

name: Biscoff Brownie
desc: Our fudgiest brownie, swirled generously with caramelised Biscoff spread. Dangerously good.

name: Chocolate Truffle Cake
desc: Layers of moist chocolate sponge enrobed in silky dark chocolate ganache. The celebration cake.

name: New York Cheesecake
desc: Dense, velvet-smooth cream cheese filling on a buttery graham base. Set overnight. Worth every bite.

name: Classic Tiramisu
desc: Espresso-soaked ladyfingers layered with mascarpone cream and dusted with fine cocoa. Italian soul.
